mapper.select: select orderid, jobid, version, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3, status, to_char(exestart,'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi:ss') as exestart from cotdl.tbl_piiorderthread where orderid= #{orderid} and jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by orderid, jobid, version, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piiorderthread (orderid, jobid, version, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3, status, exestart) values (#{orderid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq1}, #{seq2}, #{seq3}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE)
